summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now carries the ignored-phone image directly out of the previous chapter's bathroom beat, and the ending now lands more explicitly on the archive becoming external custody rather than a private folder.
edits: Revised the opening sentence to link the laundromat scene back to the fluorescent-bathroom phone refusal at the end of chapter 15.
Extended the final line to emphasize checksum, manifest, and off-body custody, strengthening the handoff toward the later public-use archive.
